name: Product Manager
description: Product managers own the strategy, roadmap, and execution of product development. They bridge engineering, design, and business teams to deliver products that solve real customer problems.
bullets: Drove 40% revenue growth by launching 3 customer-facing features based on deep user research and A/B testing
Aligned cross-functional team of 15 engineers, designers, and analysts to ship product updates 2 weeks ahead of schedule
Built product analytics framework that reduced churn by 18% through data-driven feature prioritization
